scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && CGO_CFLAGS="${CGO_CFLAGS:+$CGO_CFLAGS }-Wno-error=missing-braces" go build -tags sqlite_fts5 -o dist/wacli ./cmd/wacli
scripts.test: pnpm -s test:go && pnpm -s test:fts && pnpm -s test:windows-lock
scripts.test:windows-lock: bash -lc 'tmp="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/wacli-lock-windows.test.exe"; GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go test -c ./internal/lock -o "$tmp"; rm -f "$tmp"'
scripts.format:check: bash -lc 'out=$(gofmt -l .); if [ -n "$out" ]; then echo "$out"; exit 1; fi'
